endpoints.name: Xenoverse Villains (Time Breakers / Dragon Ball Xenoverse antagonist cohort)

description: Mr. Nodeley again, sir, terribly sorry — Edgelord did want to draw a Demigra-Mira mechanical-lockout edge first but the cohort is real and the corpus has six anchors across two consecutive Bandai-designed sets (Cross Worlds BT3 + Colossal Warfare BT4). A parent-cohort character node for the Time Breakers: Demigra (mastermind), Towa (scientist-witch), Mira (bio-engineered ultimate-fighter). Sibling continuity-strand to baby-dbgt (different non-Toriyama-canon Dragon Ball faction, same Bandai-elevated-to-set-defining-antagonist node-shape). Six corpus anchors meeting the three-anchor cohort-establishment threshold; 12 total inventory accounting for multi-copy quantities. The Mira-Leader-locked BT4-121 Dark Kamehameha provides the mechanical-capstone evidence Bandai engineered the faction at the rules-text level. I hope this is the right call, sir.
citations: [Dragon Ball Wiki: Demigra, Towa, Mira character pages]
